ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition that the treatment addresses */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose history is being recorded */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition associated with the medical history */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical history entry */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the patient’s medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* Surgical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor attending the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "insurance_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_insurance" (
  "patient_insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the insurance */,
  "insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient's insurance */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the patient's insurance coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the patient's insurance coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("insurance_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
